title: Movie Poster To Kids Crayon Drawing Edit AI
sourceTitle: Movie Poster To Kids Crayon Drawing Edit AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image kid’s crayon drawing transformation for uploaded movie poster reference with exact composition, character pose, typography, color palette, and layout, preserving the original poster layout while changing only the drawing style. Subject: adult explorer standing beside a luminous object from the source poster remains in the exact original composition, character pose, scale, and layout, but is redrawn with simplified childlike anatomy and shaky crayon marks. Scene: Lined notebook paper scan with visible paper texture, red margin line, heavy crayon scribble background, and all original poster areas mapped onto the page. Composition: Preserve every compositional element, typography placement, color palette, and layout from the uploaded poster; Signature Elements: Preserved movie poster to kids crayon drawing edit source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Kids colored-pencil and crayon drawing with wobbly unsteady lines, uneven coloring slightly outside edges, simplified facial features, basic anatomy, handmade school-notebook charm, and flat scan presentation. Color Palette: Keep the original movie poster color palette but reinterpret it through waxy crayon and colored pencil texture on lined paper. Typography: Keep every compositional element, character pose, typography, color palette, and layout identical to the original, changing only the art style. are redrawn as shaky hand-lettered crayon matching the original font placement and approximate scale. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
